## Problem

<!-- Who is affected, what is wrong or missing, and why does it matter? -->

<!-- Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER -->

## Changes

<!-- Describe the load-bearing changes, not a file-by-file diff. Include screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Risk

<!-- What could break, and how can the change be rolled back? Use "Low" with a short reason for trivial changes. -->

## Verification

<!-- List only checks and manual testing you actually performed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior where practical.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and configuration are documented.
- [ ] Database changes use a new numbered migration.
- [ ] No secrets, private model files, or personal deployment data are included.
